documentation_impact.rationale: Phase 3 step 1 implements @pancreator/core with branded types, exports, and README Quickstart. Touches package source surfaces and the feature task list.

deferred_items.rationale: LLM-judge README contract requires the runner panel; the descriptor uses TBD-on-commit and remains for the contract runner pass.

policy_alignment.agents_md_alignment: Slice stages diffs locally, preserves the in-loop human review gate at the phase boundary, and keeps bootstrap commit-trailer discipline.
policy_alignment.constitution_alignment: Slice keeps governance artifacts traceable and machine-checkable while limiting scope to the declared package boundary.
policy_alignment.prd_alignment: Slice satisfies PRD §11 boundary-first expectation for @pancreator/core and respects the no-horizontal-primitive-deps rule.
